name: Cursor
project_binding_recipe: Bind the repo in HASP, then expose only the aliases Cursor needs for its MCP session.
approval_path: Let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session, then use project-scoped and time-boxed leases for long Cursor runs.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run or hasp_inject via the stdio tool server.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env for workspace-visible env files when convenience beats the safer path.
